steps.title: Substitute both inputs
steps.content:
Use the definition of $f$ and substitute each requested input:
$$
f(14)=\frac{14+6}{5}=\frac{20}{5}=4
$$
$$
f(4)=\frac{4+6}{5}=\frac{10}{5}=2
$$

steps.title: Subtract the values
steps.content: Now subtract the two function values in the order given by the question: $$ f(14)-f(4)=4-2=2 $$ The answer is B.
